The test cases in the file "tests.json" are testing the requirement "Determine whether Netscape Technical Support displays correctly" by testing various aspects of the browser's functionality, such as the search engine, toolbars, and the ability to change the theme. Here are some test cases that meet the requirement:

1. Test case "T-11": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the Help and Support Center correctly, including the links to Communicator 4.x, Netscape 6, International Browsers, and the Help page for Communicator 4.x.
2. Test case "T-12": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the up and down arrow keys correctly when navigating the Help menu.
3. Test case "T-13": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the correct number of columns when resizing columns in the browser window.
4. Test case "T-14": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to save passwords correctly and not ask for prefilled information on sites.
5. Test case "T-15": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to resize columns by dragging them to an arbitrary size.
6. Test case "T-16": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the correct number of columns when dragging the separator between the "Name" and "URL" columns.
7. Test case "T-17": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the correct number of columns when dragging the separator between the "Name" and "URL" columns in different directions.
8. Test case "T-18": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the correct number of columns when dragging the separator between the "Name" and "URL" columns in both directions.
9. Test case "T-19": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to save passwords correctly and not display them in the password manager.
10. Test case "T-20": This testcase tests the ability of Netscape Technical Support to display the correct number of columns when dragging the separator between the "Name" and "URL" columns in different directions and at different angles.

I hope this helps! Let me know if you have any other questions or if there's anything else I can assist you with.

The test cases in the file "tests.json" are testing the requirement that the browser's toolbar buttons execute appropriately. The test cases are:

- T-19: Verify that browser navigation toolbar buttons execute appropriately.

- T-18: Determine that Quicktime movies play properly.
- T-17: Verify that columns are resizable by dragging them to an arbitrary size.
- T-16: Verify that when you disable password manager from the preferences panel, you no longer are asked if you would like to save passwords and longer get prefilled info on sites.
- T-15: Verify that you can remove a site and username from the passwords never saved section of password manager.
- T-14: Verify that you can save a form's data from the edit menu.
- T-13: Confirm that the up arrow and down arrow keys function properly in help.
- T-12: Confirm that Netscape Technical Support displays correctly.
- T-11: Determine whether complicated rich text (such as massively nested tables) can be copied.
- T-10: Verify that dragging a text or image link from one browser window to another opens the link in the target window.
- T-9: Verify that files for installed helper applications are properly processed when dragged from the desktop.
- T-8: Verify that bookmarks are added and deleted from the personal bookmarks file.
- T-7: Verify that bookmarks can be renamed "inline" i.e. without having to use the bookmarks properties dialog.
- T-6: Verify that columns are resizable by dragging them to an arbitrary size.
- T-5: Verify that you can save a form's data from the edit menu.
- T-4: Verify that columns are added and deleted from the personal bookmarks file.
- T-3: Verify that bookmarks are added and deleted from the personal bookmarks file.
- T-2: Verify that bookmarks can be renamed.
- T-1: Verify that you can save a form's data from the edit menu.
